summary: Frontend-only testing of dark mode visibility fixes and new UI features. All requested features verified working correctly.

issues: Console warnings about chart width/height being -1 during initial render - cosmetic issue, charts render correctly after data loads

passed_tests: Dashboard: Period selector visible on dark background with correct classes (text-foreground, border-border, bg-card)
Dashboard: Accounts card shows checkboxes next to each account (3 accounts with checkboxes)
Dashboard: 'Снять все'/'Выбрать все' toggle button present and working
Dashboard: Account toggle elements have data-testid='account-toggle-{id}' attributes
Dashboard: 'Деньги бизнеса' metric displays correctly (176,20 zł)
Transactions: 'Перевод' (Transfer) button visible on dark background with correct classes (text-foreground, border-border)
Transactions: Period summary bar appears when transactions exist
Transactions: Summary shows income (+5000,00 zł), expense (-0,00 zł), net (+5000,00 zł), count (1)
Transactions: Summary elements have correct data-testid attributes (summary-income, summary-expense, summary-net, summary-count)
Bank Import Modal: Code review confirms inline Direction select per row (data-testid='tx-direction-{idx}')
Bank Import Modal: Code review confirms inline Category select per row (data-testid='tx-category-{idx}')
Bank Import Modal: Code review confirms Comment input field per row (data-testid='tx-comment-{idx}')
Bank Import Modal: No editingIdx state or pencil edit button - selects are inline-visible
critical_code_review_comments: DashboardPage.jsx line 152: Period selector has correct dark mode classes (text-foreground border-border bg-card)
DashboardPage.jsx lines 287-333: Accounts card properly implements checkboxes with toggle-all functionality
TransactionsPage.jsx line 286: Transfer button has correct dark mode classes (text-foreground border-border)
TransactionsPage.jsx lines 386-432: Period summary bar correctly shows income/expense/net/count when transactions exist
BankImportModal.jsx lines 606-648: Inline selects for direction/category and comment input per row - no pencil edit button needed
seed_data_creation: Created 1 income transaction (5000 PLN) to test period summary bar
context_for_next_testing_agent: All dark mode visibility fixes verified working. Dashboard period selector, Transfer button, accounts checkboxes, and period summary bar all functioning correctly. Bank Import Modal has inline selects (no pencil edit button) and comment field per row - verified via code review since PDF upload required to see step 2.
